zh.lifeSummary: Kudo de Pothier是Osmund de Pothier和Mrs Osmund de Pothier的女兒，於1009年出生在法國布列塔尼普盧易奧。她和Osmund Basset至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1067年在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱享年58歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯武易利勒-巴瑟特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Kudo de Pothier是Osmund de Pothier和Mrs Osmund de Pothier的女儿，于1009年出生在法国布列塔尼普盧易奧。她和Osmund Basset至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1067年在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱享年58岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯武易利勒-巴瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pothier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Andree, Chantal, Donat, Gaston, Josee, Lucien, Marcel, Narcisse, Raoul.
History: Jean-Baptiste Pothier from Chartres in Eure-et-Loir, France, married Marie-Étiennette Beauvais in Montreal, QC, in 1688. Jean Pothier from France married Anne Poirier in Acadia c. 1699.

variants.name: Potier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Monique, Raoul.  Irish Murphy.

French: occupational name for a maker of drinking and storage vessels, from potier ‘potter’, an agent derivative of Old French pot ‘drinking vessel’. In North America, the surname Potier is also an altered form of its less common French variant Pothier . It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Pottier .

nameMeanings.name: Kudo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from uod(al) ‘riches’; probably originally a short form of the various compound names formed with this element.

en.lifeSummary: Kudo de Pothier was born in 1009, in Plouigneau, Brittany, France as the daughter of Osmund de Pothier and Mrs Osmund de Pothier. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Osmund Basset. She died in 1067, in Caen, Calvados, Normandy, France, at the age of 58, and was buried in Ouilly-le-Basset, Calvados, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Kudo de Pothier est née en 1009, à Plouigneau, Bretagne, France, fille de Osmund de Pothier et Mrs Osmund de Pothier. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Osmund Basset. Elle est décédée en 1067, à Caen, Calvados, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Ouilly-le-Basset, Calvados, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Kudo de Pothier wurde 1009 in Plouigneau, Bretagne, Frankreich, als Tochter von Osmund de Pothier und Mrs Osmund de Pothier geboren. Sie hatte mit Osmund Basset mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1067 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Caen, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Ouilly-le-Basset, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Kudo de Pothier è nata il nel 1009 nel Plouigneau, Bretagne, Francia come figlia di Osmund de Pothier e Mrs Osmund de Pothier. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Osmund Basset. Morì nel 1067, nel Caen, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Ouilly-le-Basset, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Kudo de Pothierは1009年にフランスブレタグンプロウイグネアウでOsmund de PothierとMrs Osmund de Pothierの娘として生まれた。彼女はOsmund Bassetとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1067年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスケンで58歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディカルヴァドスオウイリ-レ-バセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Kudo de Pothier(은)는 1009년 프랑스 브레타그니 플루익니오에서 Osmund de Pothier(와)과 Mrs Osmund de Pothier의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Osmund Basset(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1067년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 카이에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 우이리-레-바세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Kudo de Pothier nasceu em 1009, em Plouigneau, Bretagne, França filha de Osmund de Pothier e Mrs Osmund de Pothier. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Osmund Basset. Ela faleceu em 1067, em Caen, Calvados, Normandie, França, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Ouilly-le-Basset, Calvados, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Kudo de Pothier родилась в 1009 г. в местности плуигно, бретагн, Франция. Её родителей звали Osmund de Pothier и Mrs Osmund de Pothier. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Osmund Basset. Она умерла в 1067 г. в местности каен, калвадос, норманди, Франция в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности оуилли-ле-бассет, калвадос, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Kudo de Pothier nació en 1009, en Plouigneau, Bretagne, Francia como hija de Osmund de Pothier y Mrs Osmund de Pothier. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Osmund Basset. Murió en 1067, en Caen, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Ouilly-le-Basset, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.
